CSS Color Level 5 Architecture

OKLCH Color Lab

oklab interpolation

Wide-Gamut Gradient

140 deg gradient interpolated in OKLAB space with no gray dead zones.

color-mix + oklch

Perceptual Uniformity

OKLCH maintains consistent brightness across hues.

Relative Colors

Semantic Derivation

All states derive from one origin using relative color syntax.

Base Hover Active Muted
contrast-color

Automated A11y

Browser picks readable text color with fallback behavior.

AUTO-CONTRAST TEXT
Hue Rotation

Harmonic Palette

Complementary and triadic palettes from one hue origin.

light-dark

Theme Engine

Light and dark modes are controlled by semantic tokens.

Technical Architecture

This interface demonstrates CSS Color Level 4 and 5 capabilities using OKLCH tokens, relative color derivation, and perceptual interpolation.

Architected by Oathan Rex
